special_mechanics.name: tactical_turn_based_movement
special_mechanics.description: Units move on grid-based map during turn-based combat. Any unit can be moved once per turn. Command range affects unit bonuses.

physics_values.movement_limitation: one move per unit per turn

special_mechanics.name: unit_affinity_system
special_mechanics.description: Different unit types have tactical advantages/disadvantages. Fliers strong vs soldiers but weak to bowmen. Soldiers strong vs pikemen but weak to cavalry. Seafaring units gain advantage from water positioning.

special_mechanics.name: commander_healing
special_mechanics.description: Commanders can recover HP. Troops recover 3 HP at start of turn when positioned around commander.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Warsong is a tactical RPG with turn-based combat. No character-level physics parameters (jump, gravity, acceleration) are applicable or documented. Game focuses on unit positioning, command ranges, and affinity systems rather than real-time platformer mechanics. Movement is grid-based and turn-sequenced, not continuous physics-based.
